title: Emerald into Dollar
description: Replaces the emerald texture with a clean dollar-style design for economy-based worlds
body: This texture pack changes the emerald texture into a dollar-shaped design, giving your game a unique currency-themed style. It’s perfect for economy servers, SMPs, or players who want a fresh look for trading items. The pack keeps Minecraft’s original feel while adding a fun visual twist. Lightweight, simple, and fully compatible with most other resource packs.
